chapter_title.ar: بَابُ حَقِّ الْمُؤْمِنِ عَلَى أَخِيهِ وَ أَدَاءِ حَقِّهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 75 – The rights of the Momin upon his brother and the fulfilling of his rights

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (46/ 9)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (46/ 9)
text: قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) أَ يَجِي‏ءُ أَحَدُكُمْ إِلَى أَخِيهِ فَيُدْخِلَ يَدَهُ فِي كِيسِهِ فَيَأْخُذَ حَاجَتَهُ فَلَا يَدْفَعَهُ فَقُلْتُ مَا أَعْرِفُ ذَلِكَ فِينَا فَقَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) فَلَا شَيْ‏ءَ إِذاً قُلْتُ فَالْهَلَاكُ إِذاً فَقَالَ إِنَّ الْقَوْمَ لَمْ يُعْطَوْا أَحْلَامَهُمْ بَعْدُ .

en.hubeali: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Al Jabbar, from Ibn Fazzal, from Umar Bin Aban, from Saeed Bin Al Hassan who said,

‘Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Does one of you tend to come over to his brother and insert his hand in his pocket and take (out money as per) his need, and he does not repel him?’ So I said, ‘I do not recognise that (to be happening) among us’. So Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘So there is nothing, then’. I said, ‘So (it is) the destruction, then?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Surely the people have not been Given their forbearance yet’.
en.sarwar: 13. Abu Ali al-Ash’ari has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Jabbar from ibn Faddal from ‘Amr ibn Aban from Sa’id ibn al-Hassan who has said the following: “Abu Ja’far (a.s.) once asked me, ‘Does your brother (in belief) come to you, stretch his hand in your pocket and take what he needs and you do not push him aside?’ I said, ‘I do not know that such things happen among us.’ Abu Ja’far (a.s.) then said, ‘There is nothing then.’ I said, ‘It is destruction then.’ The Imam said, ‘The people have not yet recieved their power of reason.’”
